title: pi-flows · Anthropic Messages Bridge config
description: Plugin config persisted under plugins['flows-anthropic-bridge'].* in ~/.pi/dashboard/config.json. Read by the bridge entry on pi session start.

forceCanonical.description: Equivalent to PI_ANTHROPIC_MESSAGES_FORCE_CANONICAL=1. Opens the gate for any anthropic-messages session regardless of model id.

disableCanonical.description: Equivalent to PI_ANTHROPIC_MESSAGES_DISABLE_CANONICAL=1. Forces the gate closed even for Claude-matching sessions.
